features: 【Magnetic Charging Dock for Switch 2 (2025)】Designed exclusively for Nintendo Switch 2 Joypad, this dock features magnetic alignment for effortless charging—no need to distinguish +/- joypads. Securely holds for Switch 2 Joypads in place while preventing damage from repeated plugging. Perfect for quick swaps during intense gaming sessions (Console and Joypads are not included)

【Customizable RGB Lights with Memory Function】Enhance your gaming ambiance with 9 vivid lighting modes: 7 static colors + 2 dynamic effects. The charging stand for Switch 2 features a independent LED button, lets you toggle modes instantly, long press 3-5 seconds to turn off the light. Smart memory function retains your last setting, so lights reactivate automatically when powered on

【Simultaneous 4-Joypad Charging & Storage Function】This Joypad charger for Switch 2 can quickly charge up to 4 controllers simultaneously, ensuring you never run out of battery while playing. Ideal for multiplayer nights or solo gaming marathons. It also serves as a convenient storage stand, helping to keep your desktop clean and organized

【Charging Indicators & Touch Controls】Clear LED indicators show charging status of controllers for Nintendo Switch 2: blue (standby/fully charged) and orange (charging). The touch-sensitive switch allows you to easily turn off the charging and indicators, creating a sleep-friendly environment

【Advanced Safety & Multi-Power Compatibility】Our charging dock for Switch 2 Joypad equipped with multiple protection features(overcharge/overcurrent/short-circuit/overvoltage protection) , ensuring a safe charging experience. With various power supply options, including AC adapters, the console dock, or your computer—you can conveniently charge for Joycon 2 wherever you play
